a.content: The Q3 product launch is confirmed for September 15.
a.source: Email from Ana: We've locked the Q3 product launch for September 15.

b.content: The Q3 product launch is confirmed for October 1.
b.source: Email from Marko: Update — the Q3 product launch moves to October 1.

notes: Two emails, same slot (one launch date), two values, neither aware of the other's change. A human must decide — feeds the dreaming/contradiction path. Embeds nearly identically (distinct-escalation).
